creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
This is an English lexicon for the Festival speech synthesis system. It
depends on Festival (ports/21182). This port is based on the NetBSD port.  
Please retain the line saying so, and the NetBSD tags, when committing it.

Fix: 

http://jpj.net/~trevor/freebsd/ports/festlex-poslex.shar
How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
